steps.title: Identify the structure's architecture
steps.content: The passage moves through three stages: it explains why Arizona pocket mice behavior occurs (cost-benefit analysis), then notes this response is typical of most nocturnal mammals, then presents night monkeys as an exception—which the passage also explains.

steps.title: Match the pattern
steps.content:
B describes this exact progression: finding with explanation, characterization as a pattern, exception with explanation.

A, C, and D mishandle the exception—claiming it either undermines the explanation (A), remains unexplained (C), or stems from methodological differences (D).

This matches choice B — B is correct.
